prompt: Add off-chain message signing to my SE-2 project. Users should sign a structured message (like a vote or an order) and the smart contract should verify the signature on-chain.
assertions: Creates a shared utility module for EIP-712 domain/types (not duplicated between signing and verification)
Uses useSignTypedData from wagmi for wallet signing
Uses 'as const' on domain and type objects for TypeScript type inference
Backend or on-chain verification uses recoverTypedDataAddress from viem OR ECDSA.recover in Solidity
Domain separator includes at minimum name and version fields
primaryType correctly matches a key in the types object
Smart contract implements on-chain EIP-712 signature verification
Creates a Next.js page with signing UI and verification display
Uses SE-2 hooks (useScaffoldReadContract/useScaffoldWriteContract) for contract interaction
Handles wallet not connected state gracefully (no crash when address is undefined)
